title: Incorrect handling of 'TRUE' in compound select
poc: select * from stmp S where S.i = 0;
select * from stmp S where true and S.i = 0;
select * from stmp S where  S.i = 0 and true;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of 'TRUE' in compound select
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Alice', TRUE), (2, 'Bob', FALSE), (3, 'Charlie', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE active IS TRUE;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE TRUE AND name LIKE 'A%';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = 2 AND TRUE;
